name: first-dossier
voiceover: Your TC calls you at 8AM asking what title company to use. You're driving to a showing. You forget. The deal stalls. This is why agents lose deals to deadlines they didn't see coming. Dossie opens every dossier the moment you give her a contract. She fills in the buyer, the property, the price. She calculates every TREC deadline — option period, financing, closing — and cites the exact paragraph in the contract. No spreadsheets. No guesswork. Just a clean dossier that knows what comes next, when it's due, and why. You stay in the loop. She does the work. Texas agents — meetdossie dot com slash founding.
caption: Dossie opens a dossier from a contract. Buyer, property, price, every TREC deadline cited to the paragraph. meetdossie.com/founding
